title: Willis Towers (WTW) Q3 Earnings Beat, Revenues Fall Y/Y
text: Willis Towers (WTW) Q3 results reflect soft performance of the Health, Wealth & Career and Risk & Broking segments and higher expenses.

title: Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company (WTW) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company (NASDAQ:WTW ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Carl Hess - Chief Executive Officer Andrew Krasner - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Charles Peters - Raymond James & Associates, Inc. Elyse Greenspan - Wells Fargo Securities, LLC Paul Newsome - Piper Sandler & Co. David Motemaden - Evercore ISI Andrew Kligerman - Credit Suisse AG Mark Hughes - Truist Securities, Inc. Mark Marcon - Robert W. Baird & Co. Robert Cox - Goldman Sachs Meyer Shields - Keefe, Bruyette, & Woods, Inc. Operator Good morning, and welcome to the WTW Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Surpasses Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.80% and 1.63%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Willis Towers (WTW) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Willis Towers' (WTW) third-quarter results are likely to reflect the impact of strong client demand for advisory work, new software sales, growth in Medicare Advantage revenues, expansion of local portfolios and lower expenses.

title: WTW to Announce Third Quarter Earnings on October 27, 2022
text: ARLINGTON, Va. and LONDON, Oct. 07, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WTW (Willis Towers Watson, NASDAQ: WTW), a leading global advisory, broking and solutions company, will announce its financial results for the third quarter on Thursday, October 27, 2022 before the market opens.
